file_insights.notes: Comprehensive authentication flow translations with placeholders and messaging
Shared UI vocabulary, temporal references, and form validation messages
Comprehensive error taxonomy covering HTTP, authentication, authorization, and business logic errors
Menu-related translations (file partially shown in diff)
Order-related translations (file partially shown in diff)

patterns_discovered.pattern: Nested JSON structure for translation domains
patterns_discovered.description: Translation files organized by feature area (auth, common, errors, menu, order) with nested object hierarchies for related strings
patterns_discovered.benefit: Modular organization enabling feature-based translation management

patterns_discovered.pattern: Template variable support with handlebars syntax
patterns_discovered.description: Use of {{variable}} syntax for dynamic content insertion (e.g., {{organization}}, {{year}}, {{min}}, {{max}})
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables parameterized messages without code changes

patterns_discovered.description: Error codes with human-readable fallbacks, multiple messaging levels for user states (submitting, success, error)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Better UX with contextual feedback at different application states

patterns_discovered.description: Errors categorized by type (http, auth, authz, validation, notFound, conflict, business, rateLimit, server, module)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent error handling across application with clear categorization

patterns_discovered.pattern: Reusable common strings with status enums
patterns_discovered.description: Days, months, status values, action buttons defined once in common.json for reuse across features
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents duplication and ensures consistency of terminology

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Large error translation file without prioritization
gotchas_discovered.impact: Maintenance burden with 163+ error codes that may not all be used in UI
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Recommend periodic audit of error codes against actual application usage

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Currency hardcoded to TRY in common.json
gotchas_discovered.impact: Limited to Turkish Lira only despite English translation suggesting international use
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider making currency dynamic or parameterized per organization/region

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Placeholder text embedded in translation strings
gotchas_discovered.impact: Example values like 'example@email.com' in emailPlaceholder may not translate well or may be locale-specific
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Review placeholders for each language to ensure appropriateness

gotchas_discovered.impact: Some strings end with periods, some don't (titles vs messages), may cause UX inconsistency across translations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Establish translation style guide for punctuation and formatting

gotchas_discovered.impact: menu.json and order.json files are not fully shown, unable to analyze complete structure
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Request full diff or separate analysis of remaining translation files

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created comprehensive English translation files covering authentication flows, common UI vocabulary, error messaging, and domain-specific translations
quality_indicators: Extensive error taxonomy with clear categorization
approach_outcome.execution_method: Direct file creation with single commit

recommendations.recommendation: Create translation validation schema to enforce consistent structure across all language files (en, tr, etc.) before additional languages are added
recommendations.rationale: Prevents translation maintenance issues and incomplete translations as more languages are added

recommendations.recommendation: Audit error codes against actual application usage and remove unused error definitions from errors.json
recommendations.rationale: Reduces maintenance burden and keeps translation files focused on actual use cases

recommendations.recommendation: Establish and document translation style guide covering punctuation, capitalization, placeholder handling, and formatting conventions
recommendations.rationale: Ensures consistency across translations and reduces review overhead for future language additions

recommendations.recommendation: Move currency (TRY) from common.json to a configuration layer that can be set per organization or locale
Create automated tests to verify all i18n keys are properly referenced in codebase and no orphaned translations exist
recommendations.rationale: Prevents sync issues between translation files and code usage

recommendations.recommendation: Document the translation file structure and organization strategy in project documentation
recommendations.rationale: Helps future developers understand translation architecture and maintenance procedures
